mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO ai_stu_portrait_unit (unit_name, datavalue, stu_datavalue, unit_id, stu_id, classroom_id, course_id, num, `type`, order_num, pid) VALUES
(#{item.unitName}, #{item.dataValue}, #{item.stuDataValue}, #{item.id}, #{stuId}, #{classroomId}, #{courseId}, #{num}, #{item.type}, #{item.orderNum}, #{item.pid})
